title: pelargonium × pullaceum
intro: Pelargonium × pullaceum, also known as Rosy Geranium or Cape Rose, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, Pelargonium × pullaceum is often used as a tea or tincture, and is also incorporated into creams and ointments to soothe and calm the skin.
